Object.name: RELJAS041E
Object.description: Exportar Excel Duplicatas Pagas Com Divergências

Part.Source:
&Random = Random() * 10000 &Filename = !"ExportDivergencias-" + &Random.ToString().Trim() + !".xlsx"
&ExcelDocument.Open(&Filename) Do 'CheckStatus' &ExcelDocument.Clear()
&CellRow = 1 &FirstColumn = 1
loadWWPContext.Call(&Context) If &Context.PesCod = 0 Return EndIf
&PesRaz = &Context.PesRaz For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &Context.FilCod &FilFan = FilFan Exit EndFor
//MB 4 //MT 2
&Filtro = 'APURAÇÃO: ' + trim(toformattedString(&CreDtaVct)) + ' À ' + trim(toformattedString(&FinalCreDtaVct))
if &CbrCod <> 0 For Each Order EmpCod, CbrCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CbrCod = &CbrCod
&Filtro = ' CONTA: ' + trim(CbrCtaBanCrt) if not CbrCtaBanCrtDig.IsEmpty() &Filtro = '-' + trim(CbrCtaBanCrtDig) Endif
Exit EndFor
Endif
//Header &titulo = 'DUPLICATAS PAGAS SEM JUROS' //print Cabecalho &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Text = &titulo ///End
//Print Menu &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Text = 'Seq.' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = 'Número' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = 'Cliente' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Text = 'L.C' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 4).Text = 'Valor Dup.' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 5).Text = 'Vencimento' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 6).Text = 'Pagamento' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 7).Text = 'Vencido' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 8).Text = 'Multa' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 9).Text = 'Juros' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 10).Text = 'Tot.Juro' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 11).Text = 'Juro Pago' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 12).Text = 'Bloqueto' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 13).Text = 'Diferença'
For each Order EmpCod,FilCod,CreCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA Where CreRecPag = ReceberPagar.Receber Where CreDtaVct >= &CreDtaVct and CreDtaVct <= &FinalCreDtaVct Where CreCbrCod = &CbrCod When &IsSomenteGeraBoleto = false and &CbrCod <> 0 Where CreCbrImp = TipoImpressao.GerarBoleto or CreCbrImp = TipoImpressao.ImprimirBoleto when &IsSomenteGeraBoleto = true Where CreCliCod = &CreCliCod when &CreCliCod <> 0 Where CreVlrSdo <= 0 Where (CreDtaCrt.IsEmpty() or CreDtaCrt.IsNull()) and (CreDtaPrt.IsEmpty() or CreDtaPrt.IsNull()) when &IsAdicionarProtestos = false
&CreIsRet = true if &IsSomenteViaRetorno = true &CreIsRet = false For each Order EmpCod,FilCod,CreCod,CrePagCod Where CreIsRet = true &CreIsRet = true Exit EndFor EndiF
if &CreIsRet = true &CrePagVlr = 0 &CrePagVlrDsc = 0 &CreQtdDias = 0 &CrePAGVlrJur = 0 &CrePagDta.SetEmpty() &AuxCreDtaVct = CreDtaVct &CrePagDta = CreDtaPrmPag
&CreCbrJurCod = CreCbrJurCod &Multa = 0 if &CbrMltVlr > 0 &Multa = CreVlrDup * (&CbrMltVlr /100) EndiF &AuxCreVlrDup = CreVlrDup For each Order EmpCod,FilCod,CreCod,CrePagCod Where CrePagSts <> Status_Caixa.Cancelado or CrePagSts.IsEmpty() or CrePagSts.IsNull() if CrePagVlr > &AuxCreVlrDup &CrePagVlr += &AuxCreVlrDup &CrePAGVlrJur += (CrePagVlr - &AuxCreVlrDup) Else &CrePagVlr += CrePagVlr EndIf
&CrePagVlrDsc += CrePagVlrDsc &CrePAGVlrJur += CrePagVlrJur &CreQtdDias += CrePagDta - &AuxCreDtaVct &CreDtaPrmPag = CrePagDta EndFor
retornaFeriadoPeriodo.Call(EmpCod, 'S', CreCliCobCidCod, CreDtaVct, &CreDtaPrmPag, &QtdDias)
If &CreQtdDias > &Quantidade and &QtdDias > 1
CalculaJuros.Call(EmpCod, CreCbrJurCod, &AuxCreDtaVct, &CrePagDta, CreVlrDup, &JurVct, CreCbrMltVlr, &Multa) &TotalJuros = &Multa + &JurVct &Diferenca = &TotalJuros - &CrePAGVlrJur iF &Diferenca > 0.10 or &Diferenca < -0.10
&sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem = new() &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.CreCod = CreCod &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.CreDupNro = CreDupNro &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.CreCliCod = CreCliCod &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.CreCliRaz = CreCliRaz &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.CreDtaVct = CreDtaVct &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.CreDtaPrmPag = &CrePagDta &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.CreVlrDup = CreVlrDup &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.CreBloNro = CreBloNro &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.CreCbrcod = CreCbrCod &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.DiasVencido = &CreQtdDias &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.JurosPagos = &CrePAGVlrJur &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.JurosDevidos = &JurVct &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.MultaDevida = &Multa &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.TotalDevido = &TotalJuros &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.Descontos = &CrePagVlrDsc &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.Diferenca = &Diferenca &sdtDuplicatasDivergentes.Add(&sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem) EndIf eNDiF EndIF EndFor
Do Case Case &Ordenar = 'D' //diferenca &sdtDuplicatasDivergentes.Sort('[Diferenca]') Case &Ordenar = 'V' //vencimento &sdtDuplicatasDivergentes.Sort('CreDtaVct') EndCAse
For &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem in &sdtDuplicatasDivergentes if &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.Diferenca > 0 &CreCod = &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.CreCod &CreDupNro = &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.CreDupNro &CreCliCodRaz = trim(str(&sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.CreCliCod)) + ' - ' + &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.CreCliRaz.Trim() //&CreCliRaz = &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.CreCliRaz &AuxCreDtaVct = &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.CreDtaVct &CrePagDta = &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.CreDtaPrmPag &CreVlrDup = &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.CreVlrDup &CreQtdDias = &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.DiasVencido &CrePAGVlrJur = &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.JurosPagos &JurVct = &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.JurosDevidos &Multa = &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.MultaDevida &TotalJuros = &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.TotalDevido &CrePagVlrDsc = &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.Descontos &Diferenca = &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.Diferenca &CreBloNro = &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.CreBloNro &CreCbrCod = &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.CreCbrcod &TotalGeralJuro += &TotalJuros &TotalGeralPago += &CrePAGVlrJur &TotalGeralDiferenca += &Diferenca
//print Dados &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Number = &CreCod &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &CreDupNro &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = &CreCliCodRaz &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Number = &CreCbrCod &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 4).Number = &CreVlrDup &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 5).Date = &AuxCreDtaVct &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 6).Date = &CrePagDta &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 7).Number = &CreQtdDias &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 8).Number = &Multa &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 9).Number = &JurVct &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 10).Number = &TotalJuros &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 11).Number = &CrePAGVlrJur &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 12).Text = &CreBloNro &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 13).Number = &Diferenca EndiF EndFOr
//print TotalGeral &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 10).Number = &TotalGeralJuro &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 11).Number = &TotalGeralPago &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 13).Number = &TotalGeralDiferenca
if &ListarPagamentosSuperiores = true &CellRow += 2 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Text = 'Pagamentos Superiores'
//Print Menu &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Text = 'Seq.' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = 'Número' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = 'Cliente' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Text = 'L.C' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 4).Text = 'Valor Dup.' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 5).Text = 'Vencimento' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 6).Text = 'Pagamento' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 7).Text = 'Vencido' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 8).Text = 'Multa' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 9).Text = 'Juros' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 10).Text = 'Tot.Juro' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 11).Text = 'Juro Pago' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 12).Text = 'Bloqueto' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 13).Text = 'Diferença'
&TotalGeralJuro = 0 &TotalGeralPago = 0 &TotalGeralDiferenca = 0
For &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem in &sdtDuplicatasDivergentes if &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.Diferenca < 0 &CreCod = &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.CreCod &CreDupNro = &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.CreDupNro &CreCliCodRaz = trim(str(&sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.CreCliCod)) + ' - ' + &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.CreCliRaz.Trim() //&CreCliRaz = &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.CreCliRaz &AuxCreDtaVct = &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.CreDtaVct &CrePagDta = &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.CreDtaPrmPag &CreVlrDup = &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.CreVlrDup &CreQtdDias = &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.DiasVencido &CrePAGVlrJur = &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.JurosPagos &JurVct = &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.JurosDevidos &Multa = &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.MultaDevida &TotalJuros = &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.TotalDevido &CrePagVlrDsc = &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.Descontos &Diferenca = &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.Diferenca &CreBloNro = &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.CreBloNro &CreCbrCod = &sdtDuplicatasDivergentesItem.CreCbrcod &TotalGeralJuro += &TotalJuros &TotalGeralPago += &CrePAGVlrJur &TotalGeralDiferenca += &Diferenca
//print Dados &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Number = &CreCod &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &CreDupNro &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = &CreCliCodRaz &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Number = &CreCbrCod &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 4).Number = &CreVlrDup &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 5).Date = &AuxCreDtaVct &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 6).Date = &CrePagDta &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 7).Number = &CreQtdDias &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 8).Number = &Multa &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 9).Number = &JurVct &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 10).Number = &TotalJuros &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 11).Number = &CrePAGVlrJur &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 12).Text = &CreBloNro &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 13).Number = &Diferenca
EndiF EndFOr
&TotalGeralDiferenca = &TotalGeralDiferenca * -1 //print TotalGeral
&CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 10).Number = &TotalGeralJuro &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 11).Number = &TotalGeralPago &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 13).Number = &TotalGeralDiferenca
EndiF
&ExcelDocument.Save() Do 'CheckStatus' &ExcelDocument.Close()
Sub 'CheckStatus'
If (&ExcelDocument.ErrCode <> 0) &Filename = "" &ErrorMessage = &ExcelDocument.ErrDescription &ExcelDocument.Close() Return EndIf EndSub

parm(in:&EmpCod, in:&FilCod,in:&CreDtaVct, in:&FinalCreDtaVct, in:&Quantidade, in:&IsSomenteGeraBoleto, in:&CbrCod, in:&CreCliCod, in:&Ordenar, in:&ListarPagamentosSuperiores, in:&IsAdicionarProtestos, in:&IsSomenteViaRetorno, out:&Filename, out:&ErrorMessage);

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Exportar Excel Duplicatas Pagas Com Divergências
